name: Serial Tracking
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: User-added image]"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you\u2019re having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install the Serial Tracking add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto by Maropost control panel select the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the product management section, find the Serial Tracking add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Confirm by clicking the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button in the pop-up that appears."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once installed, the "}, {"text": "Serial Tracking", "bold": true}, {"text": " option will appear in the\u00a0"}, {"text": "Naming & Visibility", "bold": true}, {"text": " section of the product detail in the control panel:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When processing an order for a serial tracked product, there will be an option to enter the serial number of the product for warranty purposes."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once a serial number is saved against an orderline, you can view it by clicking the + icon on the left hand side of the orderline. You can also turn on the advanced config "}, {"text": "SHOW_ITEM_SERIAL_ON_OPT", "code": true}, {"text": ", to display any serial number that has been saved by default."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This can be found in "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Click on "}, {"text": "Advanced Configuration", "bold": true}, {"text": " and search in the name field. Change this to "}, {"text": "Yes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]
